priorities.name: Build Monitoring Infrastructure
priorities.prompt: Continue building the monitoring infrastructure for GENESIS. Check what exists in core/monitoring/ and build the next component: health monitor, error logger, alerting system (ntfy.sh), or web dashboard. Use the existing message bus and agent framework.

priorities.name: Extract Specialized Agents
priorities.prompt: Continue extracting specialized agents using the AgentBase framework in core/framework/. Priority order: UI Agent (Gradio wrapper), Voice Agent, Testing Agent. Check what exists in agents/ and build the next one.

priorities.name: Complete Mobile PWA
priorities.prompt: Continue work on the mobile PWA in static/. Check current state and add any missing features from the roadmap: voice input improvements, GPS tracking, health status display.

priorities.name: Build Agent Templates
priorities.prompt: Create the agent template system in templates/agent_template/ for easy agent creation. Build template files and the scripts/create_agent.py helper script.

notes: Edit this file to change autonomous priorities. The loop will work through these in order.
